bot_welcome:
👋 {name}, I'm LittleAnt AI Butler!

Chat with me or ask me to run tasks on your server.
Say "help me install xxx" to start a task.

/status - Task progress
/cancel - Cancel task
bot_help:
🐜 LittleAnt V12.1

Chat → send a message
Check status → "what's in crontab" "disk space"
Run task → "help me install nginx"

/status - Progress
/cancel - Cancel
confirm_task: Do you want me to execute "{task}" on the server?
exec_start: OK, starting. I'll report when done.
exec_failed: ⚠️ Task failed. Want me to retry?
node_problem:
⚠️ Step "{name}" failed: {detail}
Reply "skip" to continue or "cancel" to stop.
busy: A task is running. Wait or /cancel.
unknown_msg: I didn't understand. Could you rephrase?
